allow: Bash(gh pr create --title 'Remove social features: feed, profiles, user search' --body ' *)

PowerShell(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
